_comment: Source-of-truth for renaming pages in the live Squarespace site. Each entry maps a current absolute path to a target slug AND the SEO/page title (becomes the page's <title>, og:title, and the editor's Page Title field). The Playwright script `preview/rename-pages.js` reads this and drives the Squarespace admin UI to update both. After the rename succeeds, re-mirror, then re-run flatten + rebase + build-page-titles + install — the install-all command does the chain. Titles default to the slug (and→&, title-case) if omitted.
